sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: VanEck Semiconductor ETF Options Spot-On: On July 22nd, 191.64K Contracts Were Traded, With 2.27 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On July 22nd, the VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) saw significant options trading activity with 191.64K contracts changing hands, contributing to a total open interest of 2.27 million contracts. This high level of trading and open interest suggests considerable investor attention and speculative activity surrounding the semiconductor sector.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Announces a Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (REGN)
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN). The lawsuit is on behalf of investors who purchased shares between August 1, 2025, and May 15, 2026, alleging that the company made misleading statements that led to artificially inflated stock prices. Investors are encouraged to join the lawsuit by September 14, 2026.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) Given "Neutral" Rating at Piper Sandler
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has reaffirmed its "Neutral" rating on Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) with a price target of $208.00, indicating a potential slight downside from its current share price. Despite beating Q1 earnings estimates, the company's revenue fell short of expectations, and the stock is trading near its 52-week high. Insider activity includes a director buying shares and the CFO selling shares, amidst a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $200.44.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of HCA Healthcare, Inc. - HCA
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential claims on behalf of investors of HCA Healthcare, Inc. (HCA) regarding possible securities fraud or unlawful business practices. This investigation follows HCA's announcement on July 14, 2026, of lowered full-year 2026 profit guidance due to an unfavorable shift in payer mix, which caused HCA's stock price to fall by 6.95%. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Prudential Financial stock hits 52-week low at 21.75 USD
feed.summary: Prudential Financial (PRU) stock has dropped to a 52-week low of $21.75, marking a 4.2% decline over the past year and nearly 8% over the past six months. The financial services company, with a market cap of $41.28 billion and a P/E ratio of 11.95, is facing a challenging market environment. Investors are awaiting its upcoming earnings report in six days to assess the company's future trajectory.

feed.title: REGN Shareholder Alert: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Contact Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) on behalf of investors who purchased shares between August 1, 2025, and May 15, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Regeneron made misleading statements regarding the Phase I data for Fianlimab-Libtayo, creating unrealistic expectations for the Phase III study, which ultimately failed to meet its primary endpoint. Investors who suffered losses after the stock dropped by 13.95% following the announcement may be eligible to recover damages.

feed.title: Saudi Arabia's divisive EA buyout approved under EU merger rules
feed.summary: The European Commission has approved the acquisition of Electronic Arts by a consortium including Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund (PIF) for $55 billion. The approval, made under EU Merger Regulation rules, concludes that the deal will not raise competition concerns due to its limited impact on markets where the companies are active. This deal has been met with controversy, particularly regarding Saudi Arabia's human rights record and concerns about "culture washing."

feed.title: Duke Energy stock hits 52-week low at 22.87 USD
feed.summary: Duke Energy Corporation's stock has dropped to a 52-week low of $22.87, down from its high of $25.30, despite a substantial market capitalization of $99.8 billion. The company has experienced a 4.3% year-to-date decline and a 5% drop over the past six months, though it maintains strong fundamentals with 7.2% revenue growth and a low beta of 0.37. Investors are awaiting its upcoming earnings report on August 6th for further insights.

feed.title: Yum! Brands Celebrates the Power of Skills To Feed Brighter Futures
feed.summary: Yum! Brands is actively investing in youth development programs globally through its Food & Futures strategy, aligning with World Youth Skills Day. Initiatives like Pizza Hut's YEP in Sri Lanka, KFC's Hatch in the UK, KFC's Bucket Search in Thailand, and Habit Burger & Grill's ProStart program aim to provide vocational training, build confidence, and create pathways to employment for young people, including those with disabilities or who haven't completed high school. The company also supports higher education and financial literacy through programs like the Yum! Center for Global Franchise Excellence and the Taco Bell Foundation's Community Grants, emphasizing the importance of skills for brighter futures.

feed.title: Alphabet Drops 6% on Soaring AI Capex Despite 82% Cloud Surge; Meta Platforms, Snap Follow
feed.summary: Alphabet's stock (GOOGL) dropped 6% after its Q2 2026 report due to a significant hike in AI capital expenditure guidance, overshadowing strong revenue and cloud growth. While analysts trimmed price targets, they largely maintained bullish ratings, noting robust Cloud performance alongside increased AI infrastructure spending. This trend also impacted peer stocks like Meta Platforms (META) and Snap (SNAP), reflecting broader market anxiety over rising AI capex.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines - REGN
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) on behalf of investors who suffered losses. The lawsuit alleges securities fraud or unlawful business practices, stemming from stock price drops following two negative announcements related to the Phase III Fianlimab-Libtayo Study and Phase 3 Trial of Fianlimab. Investors have until September 14, 2026, to seek appointment as Lead Plaintiff.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in Microsoft Corporation of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines - MSFT
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT) for alleged securities fraud or unlawful business practices. The lawsuit advises investors who suffered losses to contact the firm, with an August 11, 2026, deadline to apply for Lead Plaintiff. The action stems from disappointing Q2 2026 results, including slowed Azure growth, increased capital expenditures, and significantly lower-than-expected Microsoft 365 Copilot seat numbers, leading to a stock price drop and subsequent reports of Copilot functionality issues and reorganization.

feed.title: Pomerantz Law Firm Announces the Filing of a Class Action Against Intuit Inc. and Certain Officers - INTU
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Intuit Inc. and certain officers, alleging misstatements about the company's competitive advantages, growth, and the overall strength of its business model. The lawsuit, filed on behalf of investors who purchased Intuit securities between August 22, 2025, and May 20, 2026, claims that Intuit was losing significant business in its tax-related segment, particularly TurboTax, due to competitive and pricing pressures, making its FY 2026 revenue growth guidance unreliable. The truth emerged on May 20, 2026, with news of job cuts and subsequently, revised lower guidance for TurboTax revenue growth, leading to a significant drop in Intuit's stock price.

feed.title: Citigroup Slashes Coinbase Price Target by 41% — What It Means for COIN Investors
feed.summary: Citigroup has significantly reduced its price target for Coinbase Global Inc. (COIN) by 41%, lowering it from $400 to $235 per share, citing concerns over regulatory challenges, declining trading volumes, and a challenging macroeconomic environment. This downgrade reflects a more cautious outlook from Wall Street, especially given the ongoing SEC lawsuit against Coinbase and the tapering optimism post-spot Bitcoin ETF approvals. Investors are advised to monitor the regulatory landscape and the outcome of legal battles as key drivers for COIN's future performance.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Ameriprise tops Q2 2026 estimates as stock slips
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial reported strong Q2 2026 results, beating Wall Street estimates with adjusted EPS of $11.07 and revenue of $4.94 billion, driven by asset growth and client engagement. Despite the strong performance and an impressive 55% return on equity, the stock slipped slightly in pre-market trading, remaining near its 52-week high. The company highlighted the impact of AI tools on advisor productivity, continued strong capital returns to shareholders, and the upcoming transition of client assets from Huntington Bank, which is expected to offset Comerica outflows.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Rollins misses Q2 2026 estimates and cuts outlook
feed.summary: Rollins (ROL) reported Q2 2026 adjusted earnings and revenue below Wall Street estimates, leading to a 14.33% stock drop and a cut in its full-year organic growth outlook. The pest control company experienced a sharp slowdown in residential pest control, particularly in brands reliant on consumer-initiated digital demand, although commercial and other services remained strong. Management attributed the weakness to softer consumer demand and lower pest pressure, but expressed confidence in long-term growth and margin expansion through operational improvements despite challenging Q3 comparisons.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (NASDAQ: ERIE) SVP adds incentive Share Credits and holds 15,997 shares
feed.summary: Marc Cipriani, Senior Vice President at Erie Indemnity (NASDAQ: ERIE), acquired 15.064 Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan Share Credits through dividend reinvestment on July 21, 2026. This transaction increased his total plan-related Share Credits to 2,238.088, which represent the right to receive Class A common shares upon retirement or separation. Cipriani also directly holds 15,997 shares of Class A common stock, and this recent acquisition was not part of a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan.

feed.title: Union Pacific picks up Canadian National's support for its plan to acquire Norfolk Southern railroad
feed.summary: Union Pacific has secured Canadian National's support for its proposed $85 billion acquisition of Norfolk Southern. This deal, if approved, would create the nation's first transcontinental railroad, reducing the number of major freight railroads to five. While some shippers are optimistic about faster deliveries, others, particularly in the chemical and agriculture industries, fear higher rates and service issues.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines shares fall as weak Q3 outlook overshadows earnings beat
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) shares dropped by approximately 5% despite reporting stronger-than-expected second-quarter results, with adjusted EPS of $0.94 and record revenue of $8.7 billion. The decline was driven by a weaker third-quarter earnings outlook, which fell below Wall Street's expectations, and a lowered full-year adjusted EPS forecast due to higher fuel costs and general uncertainty. The airline's Rapid Rewards loyalty program achieved its largest membership ever, but this positive note was overshadowed by the conservative future guidance.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan Earnings Beat Estimates on Rising Copper Prices
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) reported second-quarter earnings that exceeded expectations, driven by favorable copper pricing. The copper mining giant benefited from rising copper prices, which positively impacted its financial performance. This strong showing indicates a positive trend for the company amidst market conditions.

feed.title: SkyWest faces earnings test as analysts eye block hour outlook
feed.summary: SkyWest Inc. (SKYW) is facing increased scrutiny as it reports its second-quarter earnings, with analysts focusing on the company's "block hour" production outlook and its ability to maintain earnings momentum. Despite moderating growth expectations and industry headwinds such as pilot costs and supply chain issues, analysts maintain a buy rating with a price target implying 28.5% upside. The company's performance will be a key indicator of whether it can effectively navigate a challenging operating environment.

feed.title: Applied Materials to report fiscal third quarter 2026 results on Aug. 13
feed.summary: Applied Materials, Inc. announced it will release its fiscal third quarter 2026 financial results on August 13, 2026, followed by an earnings conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET. The webcast will provide insights into the semiconductor equipment company's performance, particularly relevant to AI infrastructure and next-generation chip commercialization. Investors will closely monitor revenue trends, order inflows, and margin stability to assess the health of the broader semiconductor cycle.

feed.title: Shutterstock stock falls as chief accounting officer to resign By Investing.com
feed.summary: Shutterstock Inc. (NYSE:SSTK) shares fell 7.7% after the company announced that Chief Accounting Officer Steven Ciardiello will resign effective August 28, 2026. This decline occurred despite the company globally launching its Unlimited downloads subscription, which includes various creative content and AI-powered capabilities. The company is currently searching for Ciardiello's successor.

feed.title: Paccar stock hits all-time high at 131.89 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Paccar Inc. stock has reached an all-time high of $131.89, currently trading at $132.93, marking a 32.95% increase over the past year. Despite being considered overvalued by InvestingPro analysis, the company demonstrates strong financial stability, having maintained dividend payments for 56 consecutive years. Recent developments include exceeding first-quarter revenue forecasts and a proposed elimination of a federal excise tax on heavy-duty trucks, which could further impact the company positively.

feed.title: Dover Corporation Announces Q2 2026 Financial Results and Investor Call Scheduled for July 23
feed.summary: Dover Corporation has announced its operational results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2026. The diversified industrial manufacturer, which serves various industrial end markets, plans to hold an investor conference call on July 23, 2026, to discuss its performance with analysts and shareholders.

feed.title: Will Costco (COST) be Able to Continue High Dividend Growth?
feed.summary: Bristol Gate Capital Partners' Q2 2026 investor letter highlighted Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) as a company poised for continued high dividend growth due to its membership-based model, strong renewal rates, and experienced management. Despite the firm lagging the S&P 500 overall, it outperformed in dividend growth. However, Costco did not make the top 40 most popular stocks among hedge funds, with some instead favoring AI stocks for greater upside and less risk.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Q2 Profit Edges Up, Net Additions Drop, Backs FY26 View; Stock Down
feed.summary: T-Mobile US reported a slight increase in second-quarter earnings, driven by growth in postpaid revenues, despite a drop in postpaid net additions. The company maintained its fiscal 2026 outlook for core adjusted EBITDA and postpaid net account additions. Following the announcement, T-Mobile US shares were down 7.30 percent in early morning trading.

feed.title: Brent oil's price briefly tops $100 per barrel, as Tesla and Alphabet drag Wall Street lower
feed.summary: Brent crude oil prices briefly surpassed $100 per barrel due to increased fighting in the Middle East, threatening global oil flow and pushing Wall Street lower. Major tech stocks Tesla and Alphabet experienced significant drops despite relatively strong earnings, negatively impacting the S&P 500 and Nasdaq. Rising oil prices are also fueling inflation concerns, potentially leading to further interest rate hikes by central banks.

feed.title: Citizens Bank shutters more than 100 supermarket outposts — with plans to open more standalone branches
feed.summary: Citizens Bank is closing 100 to 120 in-store supermarket branches as part of a 10-year strategy to shift towards more standalone, full-service locations. The bank plans to open 50 to 60 new branches, focusing on personalized banking, small businesses, and wealth management, with smaller footprints and advisory services. This move reflects a broader trend among major banks to adapt to changing consumer demands and leverage digital platforms.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) Positions to Benefit from Prudent Capital Allocation
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM) has been identified by Bristol Gate Capital Partners as a newly added position in their Q2 2026 investor letter, highlighting its strong capital allocation in high-growth projects. The company, a leading US-based aerospace and industrial firm, closed at $280.70 per share on July 22, 2026, with a 52-week gain of 50.27% and a market capitalization of $112.31 billion. Despite its strong performance, the article suggests that certain AI stocks might offer greater upside potential with less downside risk.

feed.title: Sealed Air stock trades steady as cost actions support margins and cash flow
feed.summary: Sealed Air (SEE) stock is trading steadily due to effective cost management and restructuring efforts, which are improving margins and free cash flow despite a slight decline in sales volumes. The company's adjusted EBITDA and operating income have shown year-on-year growth, driven by efficiency measures and lower input costs. Sealed Air also emphasizes innovation in sustainable packaging and automation solutions to support long-term growth and deepen customer relationships.

feed.title: Targa Resources stock hits all-time high at 287.19 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Targa Resources (TRGP) stock has reached an all-time high of $287.19, marking a significant upward trend with a 55.72% year-to-date return and a 71.73% increase over the past year. Despite this, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued. The company recently reported mixed Q1 2026 earnings, but analysts from Wells Fargo, Goldman Sachs, UBS, and Jefferies maintain optimistic outlooks with Buy ratings and raised price targets, citing strong performance and growth prospects, particularly in the Permian region.

feed.title: 30 Pennsylvania Students From 14 Districts Explore Water Careers
feed.summary: Pennsylvania American Water is investing in workforce development programs to address the growing demand for skilled workers in the water and wastewater industry. These initiatives include the Flow Forward Summer Camp for high school students and the Future Wavemakers Internship Program for college students, providing hands-on experience and career exploration. The company also supports career readiness through the American Water Charitable Foundation, which awarded $75,000 in grants to Pennsylvania nonprofits in 2025.

feed.title: West Pharma raises profit forecast on strong demand for injectable drug components
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services has raised its annual profit forecast, driven by robust demand for its components used in injectable drugs. The company reported strong Q2 adjusted earnings and net sales, exceeding analyst estimates. These positive results prompted West Pharma to boost its full-year 2026 net sales and adjusted EPS guidance.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics stock hits all-time high at 227.31 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics (DGX) stock achieved an all-time high of $227.31, with shares currently trading at $232, reflecting a 22.07% increase over the past year. The company has consistently raised its dividend for 14 consecutive years and recently surpassed analyst expectations for its second-quarter results while raising its full-year guidance. InvestingPro suggests the stock might be overvalued relative to its Fair Value.

feed.title: Teledyne Technologies Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Upbeat Q2 Earnings
feed.summary: Following strong Q2 earnings, Teledyne Technologies (NYSE: TDY) saw its stock gain 0.6% to $653.97. The company surpassed analyst estimates for both EPS and sales, reporting $6.28 per share and $1.662 billion, respectively. Analysts from Needham and Stifel raised their price targets for TDY, maintaining a Buy rating.

feed.title: Generative AI Disruption Fears Hurt Intuit (INTU)
feed.summary: Bristol Gate Capital Partners liquidated its stake in Intuit Inc. (INTU) due to concerns about generative AI's potential to disrupt its core business model and a diminished outlook for earnings durability and dividend growth. Despite this, Intuit reported strong Q3 2026 revenue growth of 10% year-over-year. The investment firm is reallocating capital to higher-conviction opportunities with better risk-adjusted return profiles, while also noting that Intuit Inc. is not among the 40 most popular stocks among hedge funds.

feed.title: General Dynamics stock hits all-time high at 381.18 USD
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) stock has reached an all-time high of $381.18, further climbing to $383.15, reflecting strong investor confidence and a 20.11% increase over the past year. Jefferies has raised its price target to $440, citing robust aerospace margins and a favorable outlook, while increased options trading activity indicates heightened market interest in the company. The aerospace and defense giant maintains a "GREAT" financial health score and has consistently raised its dividend for 12 consecutive years.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Announces A
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Zoetis Inc. (NYSE: ZTS) on behalf of investors who purchased shares between January 14, 2025, and May 6, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Zoetis made false and misleading statements, leading to artificially inflated stock prices and significant losses for investors. Shareholders are encouraged to join the lawsuit by July 27, 2026.

feed.title: RBC Capital downgrades Northern Trust to Hold-equivalent after Q2 earnings (NTRS:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets downgraded Northern Trust (NTRS) to Hold-equivalent following its Q2 earnings report. The downgrade is attributed to valuation concerns and an anticipated slowdown in revenue growth for 2027. Ahead of market open, Northern Trust's shares were down 2.37% at $174.42.

feed.title: Apple Store app adds 'virtual shopping assistant' to improve experience
feed.summary: Apple is integrating a virtual shopping assistant powered by artificial intelligence into its Apple Store app. This new feature aims to enhance the user experience by providing assistance through a chat interface. The development was revealed via a legal update posted on the company's website.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) counsel gains 23.848 deferred share credits
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity Company's EVP, Secretary, and General Counsel, Brian W. Bolash, acquired 23.848 Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan Share Credits on July 21, 2026, through dividend reinvestment. These credits represent rights to receive Class A shares upon his retirement or separation, bringing his total holdings to 3,543.181 Share Credits and 445 Class A common shares. The transaction, reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, highlights the company's compensation plan for its executives.

feed.title: Notice to Long-Term Shareholders of Erasca, Inc. (NASDAQ: ERAS); Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ: PODD); Photronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLAB); and New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NASDAQ: NUAI): Grabar Law Office is Investigating Claims on Your Behalf
feed.summary: Grabar Law Office is investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duty by officers and directors of Erasca, Inc. (ERAS), Insulet Corporation (PODD), Photronics, Inc. (PLAB), and New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NUAI). The investigations stem from various allegations including misleading statements regarding drug development and intellectual property for Erasca, manufacturing defects for Insulet, misleading demand for Photronics' products, and alleged fraudulent schemes and environmental liabilities for New Era Energy & Digital. Long-term shareholders are encouraged to contact the law office for potential corporate governance reforms and other remedies.

feed.title: WEC Maintains Overweight Rating -- Price Target Lowered to $117
feed.summary: Keybanc has maintained an Overweight rating for WEC Energy Group (WEC) but lowered its price target to $117 from $126, reflecting a cautious adjustment amidst market changes. GuruFocus assesses WEC as approximately 4.5% overvalued with a GF Value™ of $108.59 against a current price of $113.46, despite a strong GF Score™ of 80/100 indicating solid profitability and growth, alongside concerns regarding financial strength and recent insider selling.

feed.title: Garrison to retire from BD at end of fiscal year
feed.summary: Dr. Michael “Mike” Garrison, executive vice president and president of the Medical Essentials and BioPharma Systems segments at BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), is retiring after more than 20 years with the company, effective October 2. During his tenure, Garrison held several leadership roles and was instrumental in guiding BD through periods of transformation. Tom Polen, Chairman, CEO, and President of BD, expressed gratitude for Garrison’s contributions, and a search is underway for his successor in Medical Essentials, while BioPharma Systems will now report directly to Polen.

feed.title: Santander and AFC provide €100 million financing to Togo's Ministry of Finance for Italian agricultural machinery
feed.summary: Santander and Africa Finance Corporation (AFC) have provided €100 million in SACE-guaranteed financing to Togo's Ministry of Finance. This funding will facilitate the supply of Italian agricultural machinery, aligning with Italy's 'Piano Mattei per l'Africa' to integrate Italian companies into local value chains and diversify exports. The transaction underscores the growing potential for Italian technologies in emerging markets.

feed.title: Flexera is Only Vendor Named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Software Asset Management Tools Report
feed.summary: Flexera has been recognized as the only vendor named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Software Asset Management Tools. This distinction is based on strong positive feedback and high recommendation rates from verified end-user professionals. The company attributes this recognition to the trust organizations place in its Flexera One platform to manage complex technology environments, especially with growing spend, risk, and complexity across cloud, SaaS, on-premises, and AI.

feed.title: Caesars Palace Online Casino Alberta Is Live: Review, Sign Up Info & More
feed.summary: Caesars Palace Online Casino has launched in Alberta, offering players over 2,000 slots, live dealer tables from Evolution and Playtech, and Caesars Rewards benefits. The platform provides a wide range of games, including exclusive Caesars-branded titles, and supports various banking methods like Interac e-Transfer. It also emphasizes responsible gambling with configurable limits and support resources.

feed.title: Suburban Propane Partners Declares $0.325 Quarterly Distribution Per Common Unit for Q2 2026
feed.summary: Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. (NYSE: SPH) has declared a quarterly distribution of $0.325 per Common Unit for the second quarter of 2026, an annualized rate of $1.30 per unit. This distribution will be paid on August 11, 2026, to unitholders of record as of August 4, 2026. The company also noted that 100% of distributions to foreign investors are subject to U.S. federal income tax withholding at the highest applicable rate, which may impact international demand.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley adds Broadcom, removes Eaton from portfolio By Investing.com
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's Portfolio Solutions has added Broadcom Inc. to its holdings and removed Eaton Corp plc. The move reflects Morgan Stanley's strategy to gain diversified exposure to multi-year AI infrastructure spending through Broadcom's strong position in custom AI chips and infrastructure software, while also tapping into potential upside from non-AI semiconductors and stable cash flow from VMware. Eaton was removed due to its high valuation, which Morgan Stanley believes already reflects strong demand, and the portfolio's existing exposure to AI data-center power demand through Bloom Energy.
